summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 (Prophet Studio LLM content generator) + Phase 6 (Admin Dashboard UI for bot fleet) for $DEEPOTUS memecoin project. Backend testing achieved 95.2% success rate (20/21 tests), frontend testing fully successful with all UI components and integrations working correctly.

minor_issues.impact: Expected security behavior - webhooks require proper signature validation
minor_issues.note: This is correct security behavior, not a bug. Phase 3/4 platform posters not yet implemented.

passed_tests: Admin login with password deepotus2026 returns JWT token
GET /api/admin/bots/config returns config with llm block (provider + model)
GET /api/admin/bots/content-types returns 4 content archetypes with FR/EN labels + descriptions
POST /api/admin/bots/generate-preview with content_type=prophecy, platform=x returns bilingual content with 270 char budget
POST /api/admin/bots/generate-preview with content_type=kol_reply without kol_post returns 400 error
POST /api/admin/bots/generate-preview with content_type=kol_reply WITH kol_post generates reply
PUT /api/admin/bots/config with llm:{provider:'openai', model:'gpt-4o'} persists change in Mongo
PUT /api/admin/bots/config revert to anthropic claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 persists
POST /api/admin/bots/kill-switch {active:true} then {active:false} toggles cleanly
GET /api/admin/bots/jobs returns heartbeat job with next_run_time
GET /api/admin/bots/posts returns paginated log with status_counts histogram
All /api/admin/bots/* endpoints return 401/403 without JWT (proper admin auth)
POST /api/chat regression test still works (existing prophet chat not broken)
GET /api/stats, /api/vault/state, /api/prophecy regression tests return 200
/admin/bots page loads after admin login (password deepotus2026)
Kill-switch hero reflects correct state (red when ON, green when OFF)
Release button disabled when kill-switch already released; Arm button disabled when already armed
Kill-switch toggle functionality works correctly (can arm/release)
Preview tab - Generate preview button produces FR+EN bilingual output with hashtag badges
Preview tab - KOL reply requires kol_post textarea; shows error toast when empty
Preview tab - Content type and platform selection dropdowns work
Jobs tab - Shows heartbeat job in table with proper scheduling info
Logs tab - Status histogram badges render with proper colors (green/red)
Back to Admin link works correctly
Admin dashboard main page renders with new 'Bots Fleet' link in header
/admin/vault, /admin/emails, / (Landing), /how-to-buy regression tests load without errors

success_percentage.content_generation: 100% (bilingual FR+EN generation working with Claude Sonnet 4.5)
